titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 4: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 4. (A.R. No. 558 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Anantēśvaraśvāmi temple.

p.hi: Year: 2, Tula, Sunday, Jyēshṭha: 972 A.D. Oct. 13 MUla is wrong for JyesTha 1.
p.note: N. Sethuraman, Early Cholas: Mathermatics reconstructs the chronology, P. 17.

summary.p: This records a gift of 12(1/2) kaḻañju of gold for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruvanantīśvaram-Paramasvāmi by Echchil Sadurākaraṉ alias Teṉṉavaṉ Miṟaināṭṭu Mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Dēvaṉguḍi in Miṟai-kkūṟṟam on the northern bank. The amount was left in charge of the mahāsabhā of the village. The last line which is damaged seems to have recorded some other gift by the same donor to the deity Kūttaperumāḷ (Naṭarāja).
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 16.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesarivarmmarkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatu vaṭakarai
śrī viranārāyaṇaccaturvveti maṅkalattut tiruvaṉanan=tiśvarattu paramasvā
mikku vaṭakarai miṟai kūṟṟattu tevaṉkuṭi tevaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eccilc ca
turākaranāṉa teṉṉavaṉ miṟai nāṭṭu muventaveḷār candrādittavaṟ
Eriya vaiytta tirunontā viḷakku- 1- kku vaiytta poṉ 10 2ø5 paṉṉiru
kaḻaiñcarai Ippoṉṉukku Ivvāṭṭai tulānāyaṟṟu nāyaṟṟuk kiḻa
mai peṟṟa tirukkeṭṭaimutal Oru nontāviḷakku Erippatāka vaiytta Itu
masāsabhaiyār rakṣai . Ivaṉe kūttaperumāḷukku cāttina maThe last line is damaged.
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
